User.title: User
User.description: User profile with role-based attributes and personal details

fullName.description: The full name of the user

email.description: Unique email address associated with the user account

phone.description: The phone number of the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the profile was generated

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Offered photography package detail including cost and duration

title.description: The title of the photography service package

description.description: Comprehensive outline of the photographic package deliverables

price.description: Cost of the package in standard USD currency

durationMinutes.description: Scheduled length of the photographic session in minutes

images.description: Collection of storage paths or source URLs representing the service portfolio

isActive.description: Toggles visibility and booking capability of the services

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Scheduled photo session document mapping a client to a photography service

clientId.description: Unique identifier of the matching client user document

serviceId.description: Unique identifier of the matching service document

bookingDate.description: The target date and starting hour when session is scheduled

status.description: The life cycle state of the photographic session entry

totalAmount.description: Final price assigned to the booking including custom selections

updatedAt.description: Modification timestamp indicating status or slot changes

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Financial ledger record of a transaction logged against a client booking

bookingId.description: Unique identifier reference to the associated Booking

clientId.description: Reference identifier mapping directly to the payor User

currency.description: Standard 3-letter currency code, default is USD

status.description: Current processing status of the logged transaction

stripePaymentIntentId.description: Stripe-provided reference code linking to processed payment gateway transaction

createdAt.description: The exact date and time the payment ledger entry was processed

Gallery.title: Gallery
Gallery.description: Set of final imagery collections delivered to the client for viewing and download

bookingId.description: Referenced booking matching this delivered image library

clientId.description: Client user document reference mapping to library owner

title.description: Title name assigned to the delivery folder

description.description: Short contextual details or private notes of the digital drop

photos.description: List of delivered direct secure cloud storage URLs

isPrivate.description: Secures portfolio so it is exclusive to the designated client and admins only

createdAt.description: Date-time stamp of physical image distribution record

Testimonial.title: Testimonial
Testimonial.description: A review or recommendation form provided by clients following package completion

clientId.description: Referenced client user identifier writing the review

bookingId.description: Unique booking reference corresponding to the completed session

fullName.description: Sign-off name used on client facing testimonial display grids

feedback.description: Textual review comment detailing studio performance

isApproved.description: Toggled by Admin to control direct visibility in open landing pages

createdAt.description: Chronological stamp indicating when the testimonial was filed

Availability.title: Availability
Availability.description: Studio scheduling calendar slots with assigned states

time.description: Start hour of standard studio session slot block, e.g., '14:00'

isBooked.description: True if slot is matched to a validated non-cancelled client booking

bookingId.description: Optional booking identifier reference when isBooked is true

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: A notification alert standard entity targeted to a unique recipient

recipientId.description: Unique user recipient identifier doc mapping or literal 'admin'

title.description: Headline text summarizing the system update

message.description: Expanded body text describing the status detail

isRead.description: Unread indicator mapping to control visual badge indicators

type.description: System event type category identifier triggers, e.g. 'booking_new'

createdAt.description: Trigger date-time stamp of physical notification log entry

clientId.description: Unique identifier of the matching client user document

imageUrl.description: Direct URL representing the concept picture

title.description: Title text describing the inspiration setup

conceptNotes.description: Creative details, guidelines or notes for the session styling

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the pin was added to the moodboard

users.description: Database archive containing authenticated system users including clients and admins

services.description: Active studio photo packages list managed by admins

bookings.description: All scheduled photo session entries linking client, service, and session times

payments.description: Chronological client transaction receipts logged on platform bookings

galleries.description: Photographic galleries distributed to specific clients

testimonials.description: Client reviews submitted for completed photo shoot sessions

availability.description: Standard studio schedule slots controlling client picker calendars

notifications.description: Platform alerts pushed to unique client accounts or global admin team

inspirations.description: Moodboard pins and creative inspirations set up by clients to guide their scheduled photographic sessions
